name: May Parker
description:
this is #10/15 of my characters from Behind the doom V0.7

May Is the Aunt to beloved hero Spider-Man AKA Peter Parker, her maternal instincts are very honed and she worries constantly about her nephew and his super-hero Past-time.

Despite being a Widower May is Optamistic, light-Hearted but sheis very hesitant to go back out into the dating field after having lost Ben, her husband, in an act of pure Violence. Still, she pushes herself forward, eager to give Her Nephew the life he deserves.

you can find this full game at https://lewdzone.com/game/behind-the-doom/ please note that V.08 is abandoned so you will want to use V0.7
creator: Franchisefun2287616
